feed.title: App Store Discounts（TW）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:73536236398899200+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008546980077568+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 欢迎订阅 App Store Discounts
entry.summary: 感谢您订阅我们的 RSS 源，我们是一个致力于为全球用户带来 App Store 最新折扣信息的社区驱动项目。我们的目标是让每一位用户都能第一时间掌握心爱应用的优惠动态，无论是应用本身的价格下调，还是内购项目的限时促销，我们都将为您一网打尽！
entry.content:
感谢您订阅我们的 RSS 源，我们是一个致力于为全球用户带来 App Store 最新折扣信息的社区驱动项目。我们的目标是让每一位用户都能第一时间掌握心爱应用的优惠动态，无论是应用本身的价格下调，还是内购项目的限时促销，我们都将为您一网打尽！

关于我们的 RSS 源

  • 专注于推送 App Store 应用的优惠信息
  • 只要应用价格降低或内购项降价，我们就会及时推送
  • 每个应用的优惠信息以单独的 feed 形式呈现
  • RSS 源完全开源，您可以随时查看、贡献和添加您关注的应用

找到我们

App Store Discounts

最后

如果本项目对你有帮助，请帮我们点个 ⭐️ 可好

entry.title: 统计数据报告
entry.content:
追踪的国家或地区

  1. 中国大陆(CN)
  2. 中国香港(HK)
  3. 中国澳门(MO)
  4. 中国台湾(TW)
  5. 美国(US)
  6. 土耳其(TR)
  7. 葡萄牙(PT)

追踪的应用数量统计

类别 总应用 人为添加 自动添加 禁止推送
所有 1929 201 1728 82
TW 1810 177 1633 73

本月应用优惠次数排行(TW)

由于支持了根据付费应用排行榜自动添加追踪的应用，现目前大部分应用是自动添加的，应用的质量是未知不可控的，当前这个排行榜会作为后续禁用推送的一个参考

  • 价格：2

entry.title: Balatro
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：$290.00 → $255.00 [$60.00 ~ $320.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：$255.00

应用描述

歡迎遊玩Balatro官方遊戲！ Balatro是一款混合接龍與撲克等紙牌遊戲的神奇混合體，讓您以前所未見的方式扭曲遊戲規則，令人愛不釋手、滿意無比！ 你的目標：打造強力的撲克手牌，擊敗Boss盲注。 找尋改變遊戲的新小丑，創造精彩絕倫的組合！贏得足量籌碼，擊敗詭譎頭目，在遊戲中尋覓隱藏獎勵出牌和牌組。 要擊敗大頭目，贏得最終挑戰並贏得遊戲，您需要聚集可以獲得的一切輔助手段。 遊戲特性： 每次遊玩都不一樣：每次抓牌、棄牌和小丑都能極大程度地變化您本次遊玩的進程。 多種遊戲物品：發現超過150種小丑，每種小丑都有特別的能力。將它們與不同牌組相結合，升級牌和禮券提升得分。 多樣遊戲模式：戰役模式與挑戰模式，供您隨心遊玩。 美麗的畫素美術：在CRT風的模糊畫面中沉溺，享受手工繪製、細緻入微的畫素美術：

应用截屏

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: 3D Pinball Space Cadet
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：$120.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ $120.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

App內購買

  • Remove Ads：$60.00

应用描述

The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

应用截屏

iPhone

entry.title: 王國保衛戰：復仇
entry.content:
优惠信息

App內購買

  • Tower Shaolin Temple：$90.00 → $30.00 [$30.00 ~ $90.00]

全部价格信息

价格：$150.00

App內購買

  • Tower War Zepelling：$150.00
  • Tower Wicked Sisters：$90.00
  • Tower Swamp Monster：$90.00
  • Tower Ignis Altar：$30.00
  • Tower Shaolin Temple：$30.00
  • Tower Rotten Forest：$30.00
  • Tower Blazing Watcher：$90.00
  • Tower Deep Devils Reef：$30.00
  • Hero Tank：$120.00
  • Hero Tramin：$90.00

应用描述

威猛全能的巫師威之難回來了！開啟一趟史詩之旅，召集他的軍隊，完成他的陰謀計劃…木哈哈哈。讓整個王國知道誰才是真正的頭目！奮力向前，征服新的領地，還有那些不錯的舊領地。在這款幽默史詩的經典塔防遊戲中，直面強大敵人的帝國，對抗超威的頭目！ 遊戲特色 - 22種具有特殊技能與力量的新防禦塔。 - 選擇防禦塔武器，組合成超強破壞力的裝備，阻止敵人進攻！ - 三個大陸上的42個挑戰關卡，已準備好等你來！ - 17個強大的英雄，毫不猶豫聽候你的調遣。 - 超過60種死敵來測驗你的智慧與戰術技巧。 - 在最傳奇的頭目戰鬥中，打敗17位威武的魔王，包圍你的王國！ - 新的能力與援軍，助你殲滅敵人。 - 10多種小物件與法器，在戰鬥中提供額外優勢。 - 30種升級可訓練軍隊到最佳狀態。 - 60多種成就，隱藏的秘密和其他好玩的東東等你來發現！ - 你的黑塔里沒有WiFi？不用擔心，可以離線玩哦！ 這裡有魔王威之難最新訊息： https://www.kingdomrushvengeance.com/ 條款及條件： https://www.ironhidegames.com/TermsOfService 隱私權政策： https://www.ironhidegames.com/PrivacyPolicy

应用截屏

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Card.Note - 多彩卡片笔记
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：$30.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ $30.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

App內購買

  • Card.Note Premiun：$30.00

应用描述

Card.Note：小某书百万博主私藏推荐的手账类App 这是一款以卡片为主要设计理念的极简记事 App ； 你写的每一段文字都可以生成一张张精美的卡片 。 你可以用它来写诗、短文、随想； 也可以用它来写日记、清单、规划、要事提醒； 还可以直接用语音输入来记录每个瞬间的念头。 「Card.Note」九大特点： 1.极简设计 循着极简的设计理念，结合图标及手势操作，轻松上手。 2.文青定制 精选了 10 款记事字体及 9 种文青主题色卡、多达 100 种不同颜色的色卡，可根据喜好定制各种卡片。 3.全局卡片化 充分融入了卡片设计理念，可根据喜好随意切换横版或竖版两种卡片笔记显示样式。 4.全局手势化 下拉可新建笔记，再下拉可保存笔记，右滑可呼出作品集，长按卡片可预览卡片内容。 5.语音录入 打开便可直接语音输入，随时记录每个灵光显现的想法。你可以把它当作成iOS文艺版“闪念胶囊”。 6.要事提醒： 可设置提醒闹种，重要事情和计划不再错失。 7.快捷高效 支持Widget小组件功能，可直接在应用图标或Widget快速打开应用或直接进入创建笔记界面，让你随时高效地记录每个念头。 8.iCloud云同步 支持iCloud云同步，多台设备间数据可任意同步。 9.深色模式 全局适配深色模式，视觉舒适不刺眼。 感谢下载，生活愉快。 如有问题或建议，请联系开发者 微博：土味文艺开发者 邮箱：yande18@126.com

应用截屏

iPad

entry.title: 3D Pinball Space Cadet
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：$120.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ $120.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

App內購買

  • Remove Ads：$0.00

应用描述

The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

应用截屏

iPhone

entry.title: Genius Scan Enterprise - PDF
entry.content:
优惠信息

App內購買

  • Genius Scan Ultra：$1,290.00 → $150.00 [$150.00 ~ $1,290.00]

全部价格信息

价格：$1,490.00

App內購買

  • Genius Scan Ultra：$150.00
  • 超大贊助：$320.00
  • 慷慨捐贈：$90.00
  • 小貼士：$30.00

应用描述

Genius Scan 是一款可裝入口袋的掃描器。 可隨時隨地快速掃描文件，並能匯出為JPEG或多頁PDF檔案。 *** Apple App of the Week *** 2000多萬使用者 *** 1000多家小企業 *** 將任何文件放在裝置的相機前面：我們的掃描儀應用程式會自動識別背景紙張，裁剪紙張並清理結果。您可以獲得清晰易讀的掃描。批量掃描可讓您在幾秒鐘內掃描數十頁。強大的工具可幫助您組織、共享或歸檔文件。 “下一次出差時別忘了下載一個Genius Scan，可以給自己和會計部門帶來很大方便。” - AppPicker.com “相機應用不適合對文字進行近距離掃描，但Genius Scan可以辦到。” - 衛報 ==企業版== Genius Scan+ Premium Pack： - 開箱即用（無需升級）Genius Scan+ 的所有高級功能（用下方的 + 表示）。 管理組態： - 部署到由MDM工具管理的設備中 - 按使用者預先配置部署應用程式設定（例如，設定預設電子郵件位址，WebDAV / FTP 憑據） - 控制使用者可以將文件匯出到哪些應用程式和服務 - 無廣告 ==主要功能== 智慧掃描： - 檔案檢測和背景移除 - 失真校正 - 陰影去除和缺陷清理 - 濾鏡（黑白，白板，照片） - 批量掃描 PDF建立和編輯： - 文件合併和拆分 - 多頁PDF創建 - 照片和PDF匯入 安全和隱私： - 裝置上文件處理 + 面容_ID + PDF密碼加密 文件組織： - 文件標記 - 元數據和內容搜索 + 自訂命名方案（智慧文件名稱） + 使用Genius Cloud進行備份和多裝置同步（單獨訂閱） 匯出： - 電子郵件 + Box, Dropbox, Evernote, Expensify, Google Drive, iCloud Drive, OneDrive, OneNote, FTP, SugarSync, WebDAV. + 任何與WebDAV相容的服務，例如Citrix ShareFile、NextCloud，ownCloud、Synology、Yandex。 + 自動後台自動匯出 OCR（文本識別）： + 文字提取 + 創建可搜尋的PDF + 掃描名片和建立連絡人 ==關於我們== The Grizzly Labs在法國巴黎市中心開發了Genius Scan。我們製作能夠説明全世界數百萬使用者的應用程式並在品質和隱私方面保持最高標準，我們為此感到自豪。如果您有任何疑問，請通過@thegrizzlylabs聯繫我們。 ==定價和法律== 您可以訂閱Genius Cloud進行備份和同步。在這種情況下，Genius Scan的商店會顯示每個訂閱的持續時間和價格，並在購買時更新。訂單確認後，將從iTunes帳戶中收取付款。除非在當前期間結束前24小時內關閉自動續訂，否則訂閱會自動續訂。管理訂閱，禁用iTunes帳戶設置中的自動續訂。 https://www.thegrizzlylabs.com/genius-scan/cloud/terms

entry.title: Bloons TD 5
entry.content:
优惠信息

App內購買

  • Vault O' Monkey Money：$690.00 → $390.00 [$390.00 ~ $690.00]

全部价格信息

价格：$90.00

App內購買

  • Tower Unlock All Upgrades：$30.00
  • Bundle O' Monkey Money：$90.00
  • Pile O' Monkey Money：$90.00
  • Vault O' Tokens：$320.00
  • Double Cash Mode：$320.00
  • Bigger Beacons：$30.00
  • Vault O' Monkey Money：$390.00
  • Pile O' Tokens：$150.00

应用描述

Five-star tower defense with unrivaled depth and replayability. Now with rewarded leaderboards for even more fun and challenge! The Bloons are back and this time they mean business! Build awesome towers, choose your favorite upgrades, hire cool new Special Agents, and pop every last invading Bloon! Featuring 2 brand new Towers, cool Special Agents, glorious retina graphics, original Tracks and Special Missions, a whole new tier of Specialty Building upgrades, and the powerful Monkey Lab to further upgrade your towers, Bloons TD 5 delivers hours and hours of fun, challenging play to fans and new players alike. Hours and Hours of Awesome Gameplay: * 90+ Tracks * 21 powerful towers with Activated Abilities and 2 upgrade paths * 10 Special Agents * Online Co-op play * Multi-track Odyssey Challenges * Boss Bloon Special Events * 10 Special Missions * 250+ Random Missions * Daily Challenges * New Bloon enemies - tougher Camos, Regrow Bloons, and the fearsome ZOMG * 50+ Game Center Achievements and Challenges * iCloud Support * 3 different game modes * Freeplay mode after mastering a track * 4 difficulty settings and family-friendly theme so anyone can play And that's just the beginning - regular planned updates will keep Bloons TD 5 fresh, fun, and challenging for many months to come. Now it's time to pop some Bloons! Remember to save to iCloud after each victory or purchase to save your progress. iPad version also available - check out Bloons TD 5 HD for full screen UI awesomeness! https://ninjakiwi.com/terms

应用截屏

iPhone

entry.title: Code Blue – CPR & ACLS Timer
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：$150.00 → 免費 [免費 ~ $150.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：免費

应用描述

Code Blue is a professional CPR and ACLS timer designed to support healthcare providers during cardiac arrest and resuscitation events, where every second matters. Built and tested in real clinical environments, Code Blue helps you track CPR cycles, epinephrine timing, rhythms, medications, and procedures with precision — even during long, complex codes. Whether you need a simple CPR timer or a complete cardiac arrest log, Code Blue adapts to your workflow. # Core Features # DUAL CPR & EPINEPHRINE TIMERS - Simultaneously track CPR compression cycles and epinephrine intervals - High-contrast visual alerts when time limits are exceeded REAL-TIME EVENT LOG - Register rhythms, pulse checks, medications, procedures, and interventions - Access a concise summary or a full resuscitation timeline at any moment COMPRESSION FRACTION TRACKING - Monitor compression fraction to reduce pauses and optimize CPR quality # Fully Customizable for Your Practice # CUSTOM MEDICATIONS & PROCEDURES - Add and save your own medications, doses, procedures, and rhythms FLEXIBLE WORKFLOWS Configure the app as a simple CPR timer Or use advanced logging for prolonged cardiac arrest scenarios more than an hour # First Responder & Post-Code Tools # FIRST RESPONDER MODE - Designed for out-of-hospital cardiac arrest - Save event location coordinates for later review on the interactive map CODE HISTORY & PDF EXPORT - Save previous codes - Generate and share detailed PDF reports for documentation, teaching, or review # Evidence-Based Flowcharts # ACLS & RESUSCITATION GUIDELINES - Integrated CPR and cardiac arrest flowcharts - Based on AHA ACLS and ERC post-resuscitation care guidelines # Built for Healthcare Professionals # Designed for use in: - Emergency Departments - ICUs - Wards - Prehospital and first-responder settings Code Blue helps you stay focused on patient care while the app handles timing, tracking, and documentation. # Support & Legal # For suggestions, feature requests, or bug reports, contact: Customer Support: suporte.codigoazul@gmail.com Privacy Policy: https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/privacy End User License Agreement (EULA): https://sites.google.com/view/codeblueapp/eula

应用截屏

iPad

entry.title: Northgard
entry.content:
优惠信息（价格：$290.00 → $90.00 [$90.00 ~ $290.00]）

全部价格信息

价格：$90.00

App內購買

  • Scale Bundle：$220.00
  • Fur Bundle：$220.00
  • Clan of the Dragon：$90.00
  • Clan of the snake：$90.00
  • Clan of the Kraken：$90.00
  • Clan of the Rat：$90.00
  • Clan of the Squirrel：$90.00
  • Clan of the Lynx：$90.00
  • Winter Bundle：$220.00
  • Clan of the Eagle：$90.00

应用描述

Northgard is a strategy game based on Norse mythology in which you control a Clan of Vikings fighting for the control of a mysterious newfound continent. After years of tireless explorations, brave Vikings have discovered a new land filled with mystery, danger and riches: NORTHGARD. The boldest Northmen have set sail to explore and conquer these new shores, bring fame to their Clan and write history through conquest, trading, or devotion to the Gods. That is, if they can survive the dire Wolves and Undead Warriors roaming the land, befriend or defeat the giants, and survive the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North. FEATURES • Build your settlement on the newly discovered continent of Northgard • Assign your vikings to various jobs (Farmer, Warrior, Sailor, Loremaster...) • Manage your resources carefully and survive harsh winters and vicious foes • Expand and discover new territory with unique strategic opportunities • Achieve different victory conditions (Conquest, Fame, Lore, Trading...) STORY MODE: RIG’S SAGA The Viking High King is murdered and his Regal Horn is stolen by a man named Hagen. This event kickstarts a saga that will take Rig, his son and heir accompanied by his right-hand man Brand through the new continent of Northgard. The continent where he will make new friends and foes and discover a much greater threat than Hagen, and the reasons behind his father’s assassination. MULTIPLAYER • Play with or against other Mobile players with up to 6 players • Includes Duel, Free for All and Teamplay modes CHOOSE YOUR CLAN In order to complete the 11 campaign chapters, the player will have to master the specificities of the 6 first clans and tame the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard. More clans are joining the fight for Northgard! • Clan of the Snake: Act from the shadows and take the lead with cunning guerilla tactics • Clan of the Dragon: Embrace the old ways and please the gods with sacrifices • Clan of the Kraken: Harness the bounty of the sea and unleash its brutal might You can unlock the clans of the Snake, Dragon and Kraken separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Scale Bundle. • Clan of the Horse: Devote yourself to the art of blacksmithing and craft powerful Relics • Clan of the Ox: Equip ancestral equipment and prove the might of your forefathers • Clan of the Lynx: Adopt Nature’s way and lure mythical preys into ambushes You can unlock the Clans of the Horse, Ox and Lynx separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Fur Bundle. • Clan of the Squirrel: Gather ingredients to prepare special recipes and survive the harsh winters • Clan of the Rat: Embrace the way of the Shamans and work for the clan • Clan of the Eagle: Occupy a large territory, venture outside and gather resources Unlock the clans of the Squirrel, Rat and Eagle separately by buying the DLCs, or together with the Winter Bundle. Carefully redesigned for mobile • Revamped interface • Game Center achievements • iCloud - Share your progress between iOS devices If you experience any issue with Northgard, please contact our customer support at support@playdigious.mail.helpshift.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

应用截屏

iPhone

iPad
